title: Business Development Executive Job at Just Recruitment Agency
content:
(adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    

Just Recruitment Agency is a fast-growing, fully online recruitment firm committed to connecting talented professionals with leading organizations across Nigeria. We specialize in sourcing, screening, and placing candidates in diverse industries while providing a seamless and professional recruitment experience for both employers and job seekers. Our team is dedicated to helping businesses find exceptional talent and helping candidates achieve their career goals.Just Recruitment Agency is a fast-growing, fully online recruitment firm committed to connecting talented professionals with leading organizations across Nigeria. We specialize in sourcing, screening, and placing candidates in diverse industries while providing a seamless and professional recruitment experience for both employers and job seekers. Our team is dedicated to helping businesses find exceptional talent and helping candidates achieve their career goals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Executive
Job Code: BDE115
Job Location: Isolo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking an experienced and result-driven Business Development Executive / Supervisor (Marketing Lead) to join a growing logistics firm.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for identifying business opportunities, driving revenue growth, managing client relationships, and (at senior level) leading a sales/marketing team to achieve organizational goals.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities within target markets
	Source and secure contracts from corporate clients
	Generate leads, follow up, and convert prospects into paying customers
	Develop and implement effective business growth and marketing strategies
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients and stakeholders
	Prepare and deliver presentations, proposals, and reports
	Meet and exceed sales targets and performance metrics
	Monitor market trends and competitor activities
	(For supervisory role) Lead, manage, and motivate the sales/marketing team
	(For supervisory role) Set targets, track performance, and drive team productivity.


Requirements


	BSc Degree / HND in any relevant field
	Minimum of 3 years experience in Marketing or Business Development
	Proven track record of sourcing corporate contracts and closing deals
	Strong sales, negotiation, and communication skills
	Experience in lead generation and conversion strategies
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team
	Leadership and team management experience (for supervisory role)
	Good knowledge of digital marketing and basic computer applications.


Salary
N150,000 - N300,000 per month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the state the Job Code (JOB CODE BDE115) as the subject of the mail.

Note


	Once applied, our recruitment team will review your application and reach out to you soon.
	Please make sure you meet the job requirements before    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "UI / UX Specialist",
  "description": "Avetium Consult&nbsp;is a Business Process Outsourcing and Technology solution company incorporated in Nigeria.&nbsp;Avetium Consultis what happens when top experts of top multinationals from diverse fields and similar values come together to deliver transformational solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: UI / UX Specialist

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;(Hybrid)
Industry: Financial Technology (FINTECH)
Employment Type: Contract

Key Responsibilities


	Lead the design and continuous improvement of user interfaces for USSD and mobile applications, ensuring usability across diverse user segments and device types.
	Translate business requirements and user needs into wireframes, mockups, and interactive prototypes.
	Conduct user research, persona development, journey mapping, and usability testing to validate design decisions.
	Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams including product managers, engineers, QA, and marketing to deliver cohesive and impactful user experiences.
	Design for multiple user segments (retail customers, field agents, merchants) with a focus on accessibility, simplicity, and performance.
	Ensure consistency in visual design, interaction patterns, and brand identity across all digital touchpoints.
	Analyze user behavior using tools like Google Analytics, Hotjar, or similar to inform design iterations.
	Stay current with emerging UI/UX trends, mobile-first design strategies, and best practices in the FINTECH space.


Key Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Design, Computer Science, Human-Computer Interaction, Psychology, or a related field.
	Minimum of 3 years of hands-on experience in UI/UX design, preferably within the banking, FINTECH, or digital product space.
	Demonstrated experience designing for USSD and mobile app platforms is essential.
	Strong portfolio showcasing a range of UI/UX projects, including mobile-first and low-bandwidth environments.
	Proficiency in design and prototyping tools such as Figma, Adobe XD, Sketch, InVision, or similar.
	Experience in User Research &amp; Testing: Maze, Hotjar, UserTesting, Google Analytics
	Experience in Project Management &amp; Collaboration: Jira, Confluence, Trello, Slack
	Experience in Version Control &amp; Handoff: Zeplin, Abstract, Git (basic familiarity)
	Solid understanding of responsive design, accessibility standards, and design systems.
	Familiarity with front-end technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript) is a plus.
	Strong communication skills with the ability to present and justify design decisions to stakeholders.
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects in a fast-paced, agile environment.
	Age Limit: Not more than 35 years.
",

  "validThrough": "2026-03-31",

UI / UX Specialist Job at Avetium Consult Limited




        
    

        
        Avetium Consult is a Business Process Outsourcing and Technology solution company incorporated in Nigeria. Avetium Consultis what happens when top experts of top multinationals from diverse fields and similar values come together to deliver transformational solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: UI / UX Specialist

Job Location: Lagos (Hybrid)
Industry: Financial Technology (FINTECH)
Employment Type: Contract

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Lead the design and continuous improvement of user interfaces for USSD and mobile applications, ensuring usability across diverse user segments and device types.
	Translate business requirements and user needs into wireframes, mockups, and interactive prototypes.
	Conduct user research, persona development, journey mapping, and usability testing to validate design decisions.
	Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams including product managers, engineers, QA, and marketing to deliver cohesive and impactful user experiences.
	Design for multiple user segments (retail customers, field agents, merchants) with a focus on accessibility, simplicity, and performance.
	Ensure consistency in visual design, interaction patterns, and brand identity across all digital touchpoints.
	Analyze user behavior using tools like Google Analytics, Hotjar, or similar to inform design iterations.
	Stay current with emerging UI/UX trends, mobile-first design strategies, and best practices in the FINTECH space.


Key Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Design, Computer Science, Human-Computer Interaction, Psychology, or a related field.
	Minimum of 3 years of hands-on experience in UI/UX design, preferably within the banking, FINTECH, or digital product space.
	Demonstrated experience designing for USSD and mobile app platforms is essential.
	Strong portfolio showcasing a range of UI/UX projects, including mobile-first and low-bandwidth environments.
	Proficiency in design and prototyping tools such as Figma, Adobe XD, Sketch, InVision, or similar.
	Experience in User Research & Testing: Maze, Hotjar, UserTesting, Google Analytics
	Experience in Project Management & Collaboration: Jira, Confluence, Trello, Slack
	Experience in Version Control & Handoff: Zeplin, Abstract, Git (basic familiarity)
	Solid understanding of responsive design, accessibility standards, and design systems.
	Familiarity with front-end technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript) is a plus.
	Strong communication skills with the ability to present and justify design decisions to stakeholders.
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects in a fast-paced, agile environment.
	Age Limit: Not more than 35 years.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Service Representative",
  "description": "Avetium Consult&nbsp;is a Business Process Outsourcing and Technology solution company incorporated in Nigeria.&nbsp;Avetium Consultis what happens when top experts of top multinationals from diverse fields and similar values come together to deliver transformational solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative
Job Location:&nbsp;Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a proactive and detail-oriented Customer Support Officer to serve as the primary point of contact between our manufacturing company and its customers.
	The role involves handling customer inquiries, processing orders, coordinating with production and logistics teams, and ensuring a seamless after-sales experience.


Responsibilities


	Act as the first point of contact for customer inquiries regarding products, pricing, availability, delivery timelines, and order status.
	Process customer orders accurately and coordinate with production, supply chain, and logistics teams to ensure timely fulfillment.
	Provide technical and product-related information (e.g., specifications, usage, and maintenance guidelines) to customers.
	Handle complaints, returns, and warranty-related issues in line with company policies.
	Maintain accurate records of customer interactions, transactions, feedback, and service requests in the CRM/ERP system.
	Identify recurring customer issues and collaborate with internal teams to improve service delivery.
	Contribute to customer retention efforts by ensuring a positive and consistent customer experience.


Requirements


	B.Sc Degree in Business Administration, Industrial Relations, Supply Chain or related field.
	2&ndash;3 years of experience as a customer service representative.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills (verbal and written).
	Familiarity with ERP/CRM systems (e.g., SAP, Oracle, Zoho, or similar).
	Strong problem-solving, analytical, and organizational skills.
	Ability to multiple tasks and meet deadlines.
	Attention to detail and accuracy in handling data and documentation.

Customer Service Representative Job at Avetium Consult Limited




        
    

        
        Avetium Consult is a Business Process Outsourcing and Technology solution company incorporated in Nigeria. Avetium Consultis what happens when top experts of top multinationals from diverse fields and similar values come together to deliver transformational solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative
Job Location: Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a proactive and detail-oriented Customer Support Officer to serve as the primary point of contact between our manufacturing company and its customers.
	The role involves handling customer inquiries, processing orders, coordinating with production and logistics teams, and ensuring a seamless after-sales experience.


Responsibilities


	Act as the first point of contact for customer inquiries regarding products, pricing, availability, delivery timelines, and order status.
	Process customer orders accurately and coordinate with production, supply chain, and logistics teams to ensure timely fulfillment.
	Provide technical and product-related information (e.g., specifications, usage, and maintenance guidelines) to customers.
	Handle complaints, returns, and warranty-related issues in line with company policies.
	Maintain accurate records of customer interactions, transactions, feedback, and service requests in the CRM/ERP system.
	Identify recurring customer issues and collaborate with internal teams to improve service delivery.
	Contribute to customer retention efforts by ensuring a positive and consistent customer experience.


Requirements


	B.Sc Degree in Business Administration, Industrial Relations, Supply Chain or related field.
	2–3 years of experience as a customer service representative.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills (verbal and written).
	Familiarity with ERP/CRM systems (e.g., SAP, Oracle, Zoho, or similar).
	Strong problem-solving, analytical, and organizational skills.
	Ability to multiple tasks and meet deadlines.
	Attention to detail and accuracy in handling data and documentation.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HMO Billing & Administrative Officer",
  "description": "Viewpoint Hospital is a medical service establishment with the vision to change the way Nigerians receive medical treatment and services. The hospital is equipped with cutting edge technology tools and staffed by highly qualified professionals to ensure the highest possible service deliveryis received by our patients. Our services range from Health checks to Laparoscopic (minimal Invasive) Surgeries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HMO Billing &amp; Administrative Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Gwarimpa, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive HMO Billing &amp; Administrative Officer to manage HMO billing processes while supporting day-to-day administrative operations.
	The ideal candidate will ensure accurate claims processing, efficient office coordination, and smooth communication between patients, HMOs, and internal teams.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare and submit HMO claims accurately and on time
	Verify patient eligibility and HMO coverage
	Follow up on outstanding claims and resolve rejections/denials
	Reconcile HMO payments and maintain billing records
	Liaise with HMOs on billing issues and approvals
	Ensure compliance with billing guidelines and policies
	Handle office administrative tasks
	Maintain patient records and documentation systems
	Coordinate appointments and support patient scheduling
	Manage correspondence (emails, calls, and official documents)
	Support other departments with administrative needs


Job Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting, Business Administration, Health Information Management, or related field
	Proven experience in HMO billing and/or administrative roles
	Good understanding of HMO processes and healthcare operations
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (especially Excel and Word)
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience in a hospital, clinic, or healthcare setting
	Familiarity with medical billing software
	Ability to work efficiently in a fast-paced environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;viewpointhospitalltd@gmail.com&nbsp;or&nbsp;info@viewpointhospital.com.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

HMO Billing & Administrative Officer Job at Viewpoint Hospital




        
    

        
        Viewpoint Hospital is a medical service establishment with the vision to change the way Nigerians receive medical treatment and services. The hospital is equipped with cutting edge technology tools and staffed by highly qualified professionals to ensure the highest possible service deliveryis received by our patients. Our services range from Health checks to Laparoscopic (minimal Invasive) Surgeries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HMO Billing & Administrative Officer

Job Location: Gwarimpa, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive HMO Billing & Administrative Officer to manage HMO billing processes while supporting day-to-day administrative operations.
	The ideal candidate will ensure accurate claims processing, efficient office coordination, and smooth communication between patients, HMOs, and internal teams.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare and submit HMO claims accurately and on time
	Verify patient eligibility and HMO coverage
	Follow up on outstanding claims and resolve rejections/denials
	Reconcile HMO payments and maintain billing records
	Liaise with HMOs on billing issues and approvals
	Ensure compliance with billing guidelines and policies
	Handle office administrative tasks
	Maintain patient records and documentation systems
	Coordinate appointments and support patient scheduling
	Manage correspondence (emails, calls, and official documents)
	Support other departments with administrative needs


Job Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Business Administration, Health Information Management, or related field
	Proven experience in HMO billing and/or administrative roles
	Good understanding of HMO processes and healthcare operations
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (especially Excel and Word)
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience in a hospital, clinic, or healthcare setting
	Familiarity with medical billing software
	Ability to work efficiently in a fast-paced environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] or [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Chief Operating Officer Job at Future Moves Recruitment Agency Limited
content:
Future Moves Recruitment Agency Limited (FMR Agency) - Our client in the Retail and Fashion industry is recruiting well-experienced and competent candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Chief Operating Officer

Job Location: Ilupeju, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Mode: On-site
Work Schedule: Monday – Friday
Industry: Fashion & Retail

Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	FMR Agency is recruiting an experienced and execution-driven Chief Operating Officer to oversee operational performance and drive business growth within a fast-growing fashion and retail organization.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing daily operations, implementing scalable systems, improving efficiency, and aligning operational execution with business strategy.
	This role requires a hands-on leader who can drive performance, build structure, and manage cross-functional teams.
	Ultimately, you will drive operational efficiency, improve organizational performance, and support business expansion.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee daily business operations across departments and locations
	Translate leadership strategy into operational execution
	Implement systems, processes, and frameworks to support business growth
	Establish operational KPIs and performance monitoring systems
	Drive operational efficiency and productivity improvements
	Lead and manage cross-functional teams across departments
	Identify operational bottlenecks and implement solutions
	Monitor operational costs and resource allocation
	Support business expansion and new market initiatives
	Strengthen collaboration across departments
	Drive accountability and performance across leadership teams.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Management, or related fields
	MBA or postgraduate qualification is an added advantage
	Minimum of 7 years’ experience in operations or business leadership roles
	Proven experience managing multi-functional teams
	Experience working in fast-paced or scaling organizations
	Experience within retail, fashion, or FMCG industries is preferred.


Salary
N1,000,000 Net Monthly + Highly Attractive Performance Bonus.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position and preferred location as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
